scenario_probabilities.reasoning: Base leans stagflation/KR boom mix: MQ regime growth_inflation 0.83, CPI 3.9% YoY and 3m ann 7.32%, TIPS 10y 2.00% very_tight, oil +4.2%, equity-bond corr +0.46 all support inflationary growth rather than disinflation. Against recession/credit: GDPNow 4.0%, Sahm false, CFNAI -0.03 expansion, NFCI -0.52 easy, HY OAS 280, SOFR-Tbill -4bp, VIX contango 1.21. KR boom high on exports +50.2% YoY, KR CLI 100.1 expansion, BSI 100, domestic equity leadership +42%; but foreign flow neutral and news risk-off temper it. Goldilocks low because inflation is re-accelerating, not disinflating. Global credit very low given calm/f
